title: carex × hageri
intro: Carex × hageri, also known as Hager's sedge, is a hybrid species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex × hageri include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Carex × hageri can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
